text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I told you it's no big deal. I just twisted it a little
when I stepped down.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You didn't need to take me to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I already feel fine. Are you listening? I need to
keep training.
choice_data_list:
You really think you're in the shape to
continue?

You really think you're in the shape to
continue?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I don't have time to lie around. I need to be on
my feet and running. I...
choice_data_list: It takes strength to overcome impatience.
That's so like you. All right, but be careful.
That's so like you. All right, but be careful.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I don't have time to lie around. I need to be on
my feet and running. I...
choice_data_list: It takes strength to overcome impatience.
That's so like you. All right, but be careful.
That's so like you. All right, but be careful.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
choice_data_list: Let's wait until you're fully healed.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Fine... I got it. I'll get some rest then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although somewhat reluctant, Admire Vega
listens to my advice.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's only a light injury. I can still move—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
choice_data_list:
Never mind. We need to go back to the
infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I escort the dejected Admire Vega back to the
infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm fine. It wasn't a serious injury in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You don't need to keep looking at it. You're
messing up my concentration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega returns to training while being
careful not to worsen her injury.
